2026-04-09TCTransportation Appeal Tribunal of Canada ActReappointment of a part-time member of the Transportation Appeal Tribunal of CanadaReappointment of William Raymond Cottick of Victoria, British Columbia, as a part-time member of the Transportation Appeal Tribunal of Canada, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of four years.N/A
act: Transportation Appeal Tribunal of Canada Act
subject: Reappointment of a part-time member of the Transportation Appeal Tribunal of Canada
precis: Reappointment of William Raymond Cottick of Victoria, British Columbia, as a part-time member of the Transportation Appeal Tribunal of Canada, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of four years.
